{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Traveler of Elysia
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|One can become a [[Traveler of Elysia]] through training via compatibility tests or by being born to it.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Back then, there were two ways to become a Traveler of Elysia,” Rhalia continued. “You could be trained to do it, if you met the compatibility tests. Or, sometimes, you were born to it.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
